source_name: Lemmens et al. / ORC excess heat recovery case study; cost-engineering case summary
source_notes: Public summary reports a 375 kW gross ORC for flue-gas heat recovery from an industrial kiln in Flanders, Belgium. Cost-engineering summary reports specific investment cost of 4216 EUR/kW gross.

source_name: Karellas et al. 2013, Energetic and exergetic analysis of WHR systems in cement industry
source_notes: Paper reports cement WHR can offer about 6 MW; exhaust gases around 380C and clinker cooler air around 360C; ORC efficiency 17.56%; capital cost range 1500-3000 EUR/kW; electricity price about 100 EUR/MWh; O&M 3% of capital cost.

source_name: AIST / Turboden EAF ORC case; Ja'fari et al. 2023 steel ORC review
source_notes: Public article reports the first EAF waste heat recovery ORC-based system in operation at a German steel plant with around 3 MW electrical output. Steel ORC review supports ORC waste heat recovery as a suitable technology for steel-sector decarbonization and power generation.
